mapper.select: SELECT id, username, display_name, password_hash, org_id, dept_id, status FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT r.role_code FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id INNER JOIN sys_user u ON ur.user_id = u.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND u.status = 1 AND r.status = 1 ORDER BY r.id
